description_long: This is a military-style jet airplane with a camouflage paint scheme consisting of green, brown, and gray patches, accented by roundels and insignia on the wings and tail. The fuselage is sleek and aerodynamic, with a sharply pointed nose and a bubble canopy cockpit positioned near the front. The wings are swept back and mid-mounted, featuring angular tips and a slight anhedral angle. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers with a slight dihedral, giving the rear a distinctive profile. The landing gear is deployed, with two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel. The surface appears metallic and hard, with a matte to semi-gloss finish typical of military aircraft.
description: A camouflaged military jet airplane with swept mid-mounted wings, a pointed nose, and a bubble canopy cockpit. It features deployed tricycle landing gear and a single vertical stabilizer tail.
description_view_0: The airplane is seen from the front-left, highlighting the pointed nose, bubble canopy, and the angular, swept wings with visible landing gear.
description_view_1: Viewed from the rear-left, the single vertical stabilizer, horizontal stabilizers, and the rear fuselage are prominent, with the camouflage pattern and insignia visible.
description_view_2: The right side profile shows the full length of the fuselage, the cockpit placement, and the deployed landing gear, emphasizing the aircraft's streamlined shape.
description_view_3: From the rear-right, the tail assembly, wing sweep, and undercarriage are clearly visible, along with the camouflage paint and roundels.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, swept wings with slight anhedral angle and angular tips, no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted in nacelles on either side of the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers with slight dihedral.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main units under the wings and a single nose gear, all deployed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed bubble canopy cockpit, likely single-seat, with clear visibility panels.
